mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD( BOARD_NO, UBTYPE_NO, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_WRITER ) VALUES ( #{boardNo},
NVL( (SELECT UBTYPE_NO FROM UNI_BOARD_TYPE UBT JOIN BOARD_TYPE BT ON (UBT.BTYPE_NO = BT.BTYPE_NO) WHERE UBT.UNI_NO = #{uniNo} AND BT.BTYPE_NAME = #{categoryName}), (SELECT UBTYPE_NO FROM UNI_BOARD_TYPE WHERE UNI_NO = #{uniNo} AND BTYPE_NO = 1) ), #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardWriter} )
INSERT INTO FILES( FILE_NO, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_NO) VALUES( SEQ_FILE.NEXTVAL, -- SEQ_FNO에서 변경 #{originName}, #{changeName}, #{targetType}, #{targetNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT BT.BTYPE_NAME FROM UNI_BOARD_TYPE UBT JOIN BOARD_TYPE BT ON (UBT.BTYPE_NO = BT.BTYPE_NO) WHERE UBT.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.UBTYPE_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT, B.BOARD_WRITER, M.MEM_NAME AS "boardWriterName", B.VIEW_COUNT AS "viewCount", B.CREATE_DATE AS "createDate" FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON (B.BOARD_WRITER = M.MEM_NO) WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET BOARD_TITLE = #{boardTitle}, BOARD_CONTENT = #{boardContent}, UBTYPE_NO = (SELECT UBTYPE_NO FROM UNI_BOARD_TYPE UBT JOIN BOARD_TYPE BT ON (UBT.BTYPE_NO = BT.BTYPE_NO) WHERE UBT.UNI_NO = #{uniNo} AND BT.BTYPE_NAME = #{categoryName}) WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_NO AS "fileNo", ORIGIN_NAME AS "originName", CHANGE_NAME AS "changeName", TARGET_TYPE AS "targetType", TARGET_NO AS "targetNo" FROM FILES WHERE TARGET_NO = #{boardNo} AND TARGET_TYPE = 'BOARD'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND MEM_NO = #{memNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND MEM_NO = #{memNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT( REPORT_NO, REPORT_MEM, REASON_NO, REASON_CONTENT, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_NO ) VALUES( SEQ_REPORT.NEXTVAL, -- SEQ_REPORT_NO에서 변경 #{reportMem}, #{reasonNo}, #{reasonContent}, #{targetType}, #{targetNo} )
